OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (Department 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Irma Colina is present.
David Foran appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant Yen Hsieh Jung is not present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 3245 Vicenter Street, #2, San Francisco, CA 94116. The trial date of November 26, 2007 is vacated.
